name: Impossible Coconut Pie (Thomas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender and blend for 30 seconds.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch pie pan or 9-inch square pan.
3. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle the remaining coconut over the top.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 to 45 minutes, until the coconut is golden brown.
